predicates.name: is_surviving_legal_cohabitant_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving legal cohabitant of the second (predeceased) person.

predicates.name: is_descendant_of
predicates.description: The first person is a descendant of the second person.

predicates.name: preceding_provisions_apply
predicates.description: The preceding provisions apply to the surviving legal cohabitant in relation to the predeceased legal cohabitant.

predicates.name: exception_descendant_cohabitant
predicates.description: The exception applies because the surviving legal cohabitant is a descendant of the predeceased legal cohabitant, excluding the preceding provisions.
